subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! The luminous letter was perused, and a reply was written to Jinab-i-Mahmud Khan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دیرین تحریر منیر ملاحظه گردید بجناب محمود خان جواب مرقوم شد در طی
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @non-participation in politics, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @wisdom [hikmat]
